channel.title: self on Becoming The Unbeatable
channel.description: Recent content in self on Becoming The Unbeatable

item.description: Plans Todo List Read 6 Technical Books Database Internals Designing Machine Learning Systems The Pragmatic Programmer Complete 6 Technical Courses TinyML and Efficient Deep Learning Computing MIT 18.065 Matrix Methods In Data Analysis, Signal Processing, And Machine Learning Read at-least 2 papers in a week Update Monthly Log book every friday Complete 500 more problem in LeetCode Focus on hard and mid problems (ideally 70-30 split, hard being 70%) Solve 100 problems in AtCoder + CF PkaU8iN88lAWtu4z7K1kibLZjQaVZfGnAP8GCH3/zlFFIL6D26LcqwNqi8X7SXdGCCTNN/eoC+OLiepwW18ecQ== Write 18 blogs/posts on Personal Site Goal List Reach Guardian in LeetCode Possible but slightly difficult, probably start participating in contest post March.
